title: Seig Darklighter
content:
{{Top|ncl}} {{Noncanon|legends=1}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Seig Darklighter |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Jedi-Bendu]][[The Star Wars 1|''The Star Wars'' 1]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|General Skywalker is ''no myth''. When I first arrived at court, He was ''First Bodyguard'' to the Emperor! It was ''he'' who led the Jedi rebellion.''"
"''Sieg Darklighter led the rebellion.''"
"''So the Emperor would have you believe. But I was ''there''.|Vantos Coll and Darth Vader|}} '''Seig Darklighter''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], commonly believed to have led the [[Showdown on Coruscant|Jedi Rebellion]], though the real Jedi commander was [[Luke Skywalker (The Star Wars)|Luke Skywalker]]. In the [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|second draft]], a man named Darklighter, a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], discovers the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Bogan]] and teaches it to a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] named the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], forming the [[Black Knights of the Sith]].{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller/adventures-of-the-starkiller-second-draft|text=Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|archivedate=20240818175509}} ==Behind the scenes== The name Darklighter was eventually combined with Biggs, the name of a [[Prince/Legends|prince]] and Leia's brother in the rough draft (and Luke's brother in the first draft), to form a new, non-Jedi character named [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]]. ==Appearances== *[[The Star Wars 1|''The Star Wars'' 1]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[The Star Wars rough draft|''The Star Wars'' rough draft]] *''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]'' *''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Darklighter, Seig}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Jedi individuals]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sith individuals]]
